description: Crafted from soft cotton/lycra fabric, this high coverage brassiere from enamor is designed with a shaper panel for additional body contouring. The moulded style has double layered cups to prevent show through and ensures a smooth look with a cut that offers exemplary comfort making it perfect for the confident you. Ideal for daily wear.Made of breathable stretch cotton/lycra fabric for enhanced comfortShaper panel with double layered cups for perfect smoothness, shaping and styleBeautifully cushioned straps with perfect stretchPrinted label for abrasion-free comfortWash careHand wash below 40 degrees Do not bleach or ironDrip dry in shade Owing to intimate nature of this product it is eligible for self-ship return only (no pick-up facility)
